nodes.standard_name: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
nodes.original_text_name: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
nodes.context: Federation of 12 armed groups in Haiti, controls over 80% of Port-au-Prince, involved in murder, drug trafficking, kidnapping.
Armed group founded by Jimmy Chérizier, founding member of G9 Family.
Armed group supportive of the Haitian Government, rival of G9 Family.
Coalition formed by G9 Family and G-Pèp in February 2024.
Haitian gang, ally of G9 Family.
Haitian gang, ally of G9 Family.
Haitian gang, ally of G9 Family.
Political party, formerly allied with G9 Family until 2021.
Haitian gang, rival of G9 Family.
